sharedPost.text:
SUNDAY 12th APRIL 

We’re back this Sunday with another fantastic open mic night at the drop inn ! 

Here are some videos from Easter Sunday ! 
In the first video we have Henry on the guitar. He sang us some classic tunes while he also played his guitar. He is very talented! ( he even took requests!) this is his tik tok link down below 👇 

@henry.james.music

The second video, as it was a special occasion 🐣, we have my niece Lyla singing Naughty from Matilda the Musical. An unreal performance, had the audience cheering very loud !! 👏

A big thank you to everyone who got up to sing you were all fantastic and I hope to see you at the open mic again soon ! 

The crowd loved it that much and didn’t want it to stop so I kept singing for an extra 1hr !!! 🥳

Are you a performer ? 

- singer 
- poet 
- musician 
- Comedian 

Come on down to my open mic evening and show off your talents ! It has been well attended since I started a few weeks ago and I hope to keep growing the supportive community!! 

I hope to see you this Sunday at 3pm to show off your skills 🎶🎙️

The Drop Inn at Last Drop Village Hotel & Spa

items.text:
We are now casting  for our touring  Summer  show Bring Mer Sunshine.

The show is a musical  show featuring songs from around the world La Bamba, Viva Espana, Come Fly With Me,. Summer Holiday ,  Sway , and many more.

We are looking for an experienced hardworking M/F  performer who are keen to take quality musical shows to the community  based   venues .

The show is a one man/woman show so we are looking for experienced performers that can hold an audience and are looking for engaging vocalist performers.

Rehearsals- 25th  -29th May

Playing Dates- 1st June -31st July

We work Monday to Friday (2 x 60 minute shows per day)

Casting Breakdown

We are looking for drivers with cars only .

We are looking for performers on all area of the UK -please include bases when sending details.

We are offering 700.00 per week plus fuel on the road as well as accommodation allowance  if needed on the road

Please send details including a singing reel to [info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk](mailto:info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk)

items.text:
✨ CASTING CALL – TRIPLE THREAT PERFORMERS ✨

Fairytale Celebrations UK are seeking triple threat performers of East Asian descent for an exciting high-energy tribute act, with nationwide bookings confirmed for Summer 2026.

We are looking for strong performers who excel in:
🎤 Singing
💃 Dance (commercial / K-pop style preferred)
🎭 Performance & audience interaction

📍 Rehearsals: Manchester-based
🚗 Work: Nationwide bookings
💷 Pay: £50–£90 per hour (dependent on event) + paid travel

This is a fantastic opportunity to be part of a professional, high-quality production with a focus on authentic representation and dynamic performance.

To apply, please send:
• Headshot
• Vocal reel
• Dance reel (if available)

📧 info@fairytalecelebrations.co.uk

Join us for a summer of high-energy performances, incredible audiences, and unforgettable experiences ✨

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – MUSIC VIDEO SHORT FILM**
**“SNIFFING OUT TROUBLE”**
From ThunderKnight Entertainment Ltd.

Casting for the high-energy music video follow-up to the feature film *HEAVY WEAPON*.

We are seeking **female actors (ages 18–50)** with **basic dance experience** for a stylized, story-driven scene set inside a dance studio, where investigators uncover clues tied to a mysterious crime.

🎬 **What You Get:**
• IMDb credit
• Gas stipend
• Professional-quality footage & photography for your demo reel

🔥 This is a dynamic, cinematic shoot blending performance, movement, and storytelling — perfect for talent looking to expand their reel with something bold and visually striking.

📩 **To Submit:**
Send headshot + contact info to: **Thunderknightltd@gmail.com**
📱 Or text: **720-569-7460** for details

items.text:
CASTING!!!!!

S.E.B. Casting is casting real families to be in a PSA for the National Forest Foundation. 

Looking for authentic families of 4-5. 
2 Parents between 30-45, 
2 children between 4-8, or one boy between 8-10 & one girl between 11-13 plus her best friend same age 
1 Grandparent over 50 (if available)
Also looking for a family dog! 

Ideal candidates are fun loving, comfortable, friendly, enjoy the outdoors, but do not need to be super athletic or ultra granola types, just regular families who like to go into the forest for a fun day or weekend. All types! All ethnicities! No film or television experience necessary! 

Pay rate is $1400 per person 

Usage is: 60 plus :30, :15, :4 x :06 LIFTS
Terms: One year from first use date, May 16, 2026. Usage covers theatrical release, national broadcast, all linear TV/CTV, online/digital/Internet video, paid and unpaid social media, OOH, and stills (print, paid/unpaid social, online, and OOH). Option to renew for Year 2 and each subsequent year, not to exceed +10% per talent. Theatrical Release=AMC. They run a free PSA for NFF annually.

Shoot Date is April 30 near Bailey

If you or someone you know is interested, please send a recent family photo (selfies are ok!), a list of everybody’s name and age, and a few sentences about what you love about the outdoors or what is your favorite thing to do in the forest to shauna@sebcasting.com with NFF in the subject line by April 12th. 

Can’t wait to see you play in the woods!!!

Terms: One year from first use date, May 16, 2026. Usage covers theatrical release, national broadcast, all linear TV/CTV, online/digital/Internet video, paid and unpaid social media, OOH, and stills (print, paid/unpaid social, online, and OOH). Option to renew for Year 2 and each subsequent year, not to exceed +10% per talent. Theatrical Release=AMC. They run a free PSA for NFF annually.

Shoot Date is April 30 near Bailey

If you or someone you know is interested, please send a recent family photo (selfies are ok!), a list of everybody’s name and age, and a few sentences about what you love about the outdoors or what is your favorite thing to do in the forest to shauna@sebcasting.com with NFF in the subject line by April 12th. 

Can’t wait to see you play in the woods!!!

items.text:
The Empty Head Theater Company – Open Call
The Empty Head Theater Company is inviting actors, writers, directors, designers, and
technicians to join our growing ensemble.
We are a Newburgh-based, ensemble-driven company dedicated to new plays and innovative
theater forms, and we’re actively building a year-round company of committed artists.
This August, we will present Out of the Box: A Celebration of New Plays, featuring four original one-act plays (30–40 minutes each). All casting will be drawn from the company, and we are currently seeking new ensemble members to be part of this and future productions.
We are especially interested in:
• Actors who are collaborative and open to ensemble work�
• Writers developing new material�
• Directors, designers, and technicians looking to create original work�
No matter your background, we value commitment, curiosity, and a willingness to work as
part of a team.
All performers will be invited to participate in a workshop with current company members as part of the audition process. This gives us a chance to work together and get a real sense of how we collaborate.
We are based at The Ellis, 60 Dubois Street, Newburgh, NY, and are building a company rooted in the local community while creating work that reaches beyond it.
To schedule an interview/audition or submit work, contact:� pelliscult@gmail.com
Come make something new.

sharedPost.text:
Noch ein paar Schritte, dann …

Es ist immer wieder schön zu erleben. Ich sitze im Studio mit nichts, und nach einigen Stunden Kann ich ein Musikstück präsentieren. Ich habe komponiert, getextet ,produziert und gesungen. Das gibt mir persönlich sehr viel. Ich mache das in erster Linie für mich. Wer gefallen dran findet, soll teilhaben, kann auch streamen auf allen Plattformen weltweit. Ich finde es Top. 
Ich hatte vor einigen Tagen ein Post geteilt, der vieles von mir beschreibt. Ich werde mich von Menschen trennen die mir nicht gut tun . Sie gehören nicht in mein Leben. Munter bleiben!

items.text:
Wydarzenie dla tych, którzy chcą pokazać swoją formę artystyczną na scenie (szczęście, że słowo „forma” jest bardzo pojemne). 

Wejście free

sharedPost.text:
Latająca Forma Szybko wraca z 7. wiosenną edycją!

LFS to wydarzenie, na które może przyjść każdy, kto chce pokazać, co tworzy. To okazja do prób i eksperymentów artystycznych, a także wychodzenia ze swojej strefy komfortu. 

Mamy przyjemność zaprosić każdego do Drzwi Zwanych Koniem @drzwi_zwane_koniem gdzie wspólnie stworzymy przestrzeń, w której miniperformans może być ważniejszy niż wielki spektakl. Tutaj każda forma wyrazu jest cenna. Czekamy na różnorodne formy muzyczne, sztukę wizualną, rękodzieło oraz wasze teksty. Tutaj możesz wyjść na scenę i powiedzieć coś, czego nigdy nie powiedziałeś na głos, pokazać to, co powstało o 2 w nocy,
zrobić coś, co istnieje tylko przez te kilka minut na scenie. Przyjdź i pokaż, co cię fascynuje. 

Kliknij w formularz i zapisz się! Zapisując się, uwzględnij czas trwania swojej formy oraz potrzebny ci do tego sprzęt, abyśmy mogli wszystko doskonale zaplanować.

Do zobaczenia!

Link do formularza: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdUthE3hl2hLCyVEuKyc3YKROYcjso8ZydXSC_po0Yan5vStQ/viewform

items.text:
Hi, my name is Lucas Woolrich. I’m planning to make a new Batman fan film which will be uploaded to Youtube. The film is titled BATMAN VENGEANCE which will be a loose adaptation of the BATMAN HEAT comic book storyline. The story for the film sees Batman teaming up with Catwoman to track down a psychopathic serial killer known as Catman.

I’m looking to cast the roles of CATWOMAN and CATMAN for the film. Filming will be in Manchester UK. Payment is £20 an hour. Filming will be on Monday 4th May.

Applicants must be 18 years old and over. The applicants will have to provide their own costume for the role. Please e-mail me at superheroes4@outlook.com and send your resumes and headshots if you’re interested. Thanks.

items.text:
A recent actor headshot session that really stayed with me.

Jae came in open, focused, and ready to explore a range of moods - and that trust made everything easier.

Jae is also a wheelchair user and has significant hearing loss, so we adapted how we communicated and worked on the day using technology. Once we found our rhythm, everything flowed.

What stood out was Jae’s ability to take direction, settle into different mindsets, and bring something real into each frame - not forced, not overdone.

That’s what creates range. And that’s what casting needs to see.

If you’re an actor looking for headshots that feel natural, varied, and true to you (not just “a nice photo”), feel free to drop me a message.

DMs welcome

https://www.CaptivatingHeadshots.co.uk

🎬 **CASTING CALL – STUDENT SHORT FILM** 🎬

**Production Title:** *What She Can’t Remember*

Manchester Youth Home School is looking for **volunteer actors** to take part in a powerful student short film, which will be screened at the **Audience Cinema during the Manchester Film Festival next year**.

**⚠️ Please note:** This is an **unpaid, volunteer opportunity** as part of a student project.

**ROLES AVAILABLE:**

👩 **Mum**
* Female
* Playing age: 35–55
* Role involves appearing in a **car crash scene** (non-speaking, unconscious)

👨 **Dad**
* Male
* Playing age: 35–55
* Role involves appearing in a **car crash scene** (non-speaking, unconscious)

This is a great opportunity to gain experience on a film set, support a student production, and be part of a project showcased at a major local festival.

If you’re interested, please get in touch with your name, age, and any acting experience (if applicable).

🎥 We look forward to hearing from you!

items.text:
CASTING CALL 

ROLE

LARA – Supporting Role

Gender: Female

Playing Age: 18–21

Ethnicity: Open

CHARACTER DESCRIPTION

Lara is Amelia’s older sister and guardian figure.

She is caring, protective, and practical, but beneath her calm exterior she struggles with the pressure of supporting her younger sister following a family tragedy.

PERFORMANCE NOTES

Warm, natural acting style

Strong emotional grounding role

Good balance of humour and sincerity

IMPORTANT INFORMATION

This is a student film project.

The role is UNPAID / VOLUNTEER, but offers on-set experience, showreel material, and the opportunity to collaborate with an emerging filmmaking team.

Manchester Youth Film School

items.text:
Pacific Producers Group & Vancouver Virtual Productions are casting for a 30-second and 15-second TV commercial to be filmed on April 16th in Coquitlam.

**3-4 Year Old Girl (female, 3-5 years old, Caucasian)**
* Positive, energetic, excitable, a winning smile
* Her character is wearing a full bathing suit, wrapped up in a towel over top, and is putting one foot in and out of a small kid-sized inflatable pool in the summer.

**ADDITIONAL DETAILS**
* Compensation: 1x30-sec ad - $750, agency fee included.
* Rights & Terms: a complete buyout for all media in perpetuity
* This is a non-union shoot (no royalties/residuals) and shooting will require a day of the talent’s time – we estimate a 2 to 4 hour day for talent
* Character has no dialogue
* We will be focused on naturalness, energy, and connection to other characters (mom)
* Lunch/food will be provided
* Filming will be indoors, in a studio
* The TV ad is for an outdoor living product, and the script is family-oriented
* Talent will provide their own basic wardrobe, but some character-specific wardrobe items may be supplied by production
* A wardrobe allowance will be added for any personal items used ($25 for basic wardrobe outfit, plus $5 for each additional item)

**AUDITION MATERIAL**

If interested, please email a headshot and resume to duramarket@duradek.com .

You’re also welcome to submit any web links to an online reel, demo, or portfolio of past work. However, we are specifically seeking audition material; these can be self-filmed on a phone or iPhone – with the following requested audition material:

We’d love to see this young actress in playful situations – skipping

rope or playing hopscotch or balancing on one leg, enjoying themselves and laughing.

topComments.text: On lunch break I will email my younger daughter’s resume and headshots! She is a fish in water absolutely loves it can dive down in deep water so totally comfortable around water!

items.text:
SAMOCHODY DO ŚLUBU | TELEDYSKÓW | SESJI ZDJĘCIOWYCH | WYDARZEŃ SPECJALNYCH
Są momenty w życiu, które muszą wyglądać wyjątkowo. I dokładnie od tego jesteśmy.

Oferujemy dostęp do floty około 20 unikalnych pojazdów, które idealnie sprawdzają się przy: 

✔ ślubach i weselach

✔ teledyskach i produkcjach filmowych

✔ sesjach zdjęciowych

✔ eventach i wydarzeniach specjalnych

Działamy na terenie całej Polski – dowozimy auto dokładnie tam, gdzie trzeba. Bez kombinowania, bez problemów.

❗ Nie wynajmujemy aut na doby do własnego użytku – tylko kompleksowa obsługa wydarzeń.

CO NAS WYRÓŻNIA?

✔ Starannie dobrana flota – od klasyków po nowoczesne bestie

✔ Możliwość dekoracji/ubioru pojazdu pod konkretną okazję

✔ Profesjonalne podejście – wszystko dopięte na czas i na poziomie

✔ Auta, które robią efekt „WOW” – na żywo i na zdjęciach

NASZE POJAZDY:

Nowoczesna elegancja i prestiż:

BMW 8 Gran Coupe 2023

Mercedes GLE 53 AMG 2020

Range Rover Sport 2021

Mercedes S-Class 2016

Mercedes S550L 2012

Mercedes CL 2012

Moc i charakter:

Jeep Wrangler 392 (3 sztuki – 2024)

Ford F-150 Platinum 2021

Audi RS6 2003

Klasyka i styl ponadczasowy:

Bentley Continental GTC 2016

Mercedes S500 1995

Mercedes SL500 1997 (Cabrio + hardtop)

Mercedes 300E 1987

Mercedes SL500 2008

Amerykańskie legendy:

Chevrolet El Camino 1977

Cadillac DeVille 1968

Jeśli zależy Ci na efekcie, który zostaje w pamięci – dobrze trafiłeś.

Tu nie ma przypadkowych aut. Każde ma swoją historię i robi robotę.

Dodatkowe zdjęcia wyślemy osobie zainteresowanej.

📩 Skontaktuj się i dopasujemy pojazd idealnie pod Twoją okazję.

TEL 790 245 958

items.text:
Drodzy przyjaciele,

Zapraszam Was do wysłuchania mojej nowej kompozycji! Nagranie zrealizowane przy użyciu sześciu kamer oraz dopracowane brzmienie – premiera odbyła się dziś.

Będę wdzięczny za Wasze komentarze.

 

My Love, My Soul. Symphonic Poem for Synth Choir, High Piano with Tube Warmth and Theremin (winds & brass).

Poemat jest poświęcony mojej ukochanej żonie Oksanie i pomyślany na trzy grupy instrumentów, które – w pewnym sensie – uosabiają integralność ludzkiej natury. Polifoniczny chór syntetyczny symbolizuje duszę – z jej poszukiwaniami, uniesieniami i wewnętrzną harmonią. Instrumenty dęte drewniane i blaszane – których partia została tu wykonana na thereminie – oddają głos duchowi, będąc jego wewnętrznym rdzeniem i siłą przewodnią obecną w każdym z nas. Natomiast wysokie rejestry fortepianu, nasycone harmonicznymi ciepłego lampowego wzmocnienia, wraz z delikatnym tremolo marimby, są jak dreszcze przebiegające po ciele od dotyku ukochanej.
items.previewTitle: My Love, My Soul ✨ Symphonic Poem for Synth Choir, High Piano and Theremin.
items.previewDescription: 🎹 Composer and performer: Zorii Fain, March - April 2026, Warsaw.📝 The poem is dedicated to my beloved wife, Oksana, and is conceived for three groups of i...

**POINTLESS** is coming back for a brand new series on BBC One!

 

We’re looking for pairs of fun and outgoing contestants who think they have what it takes to win the coveted Pointless trophy!

 

Filming is taking place in June, September and October.

 

Apply today at: [https://www.pointlessapplications.com/](https://www.pointlessapplications.com/)

attachments.ocrText: Casting flyer for Pointless, the BBC quiz show. Text reads: Pointless is back! Applications are now open for the new series of Pointless! We’re looking for fun and outgoing quizzing pairs to take part. Apply today at: www.pointlessapplications.com. Filming in June, September and October 2026. Closing date is midnight on 23 September 2026. All applicants must be 18+ and a current legal resident of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, Channel Islands or the Isle of Man. Terms and conditions apply. At the bottom is a picture of host Alexander Armstrong and the logos for the BBC and Remarkable Entertainment, the production company that makes Pointless.

"Mechanic" for Short Film (20-30y/o)
Looking to cast a mechanic character for a short film. This scene would be shot either May 2 or 3, in a home garage. Should be a half day or less. It would not involve extensive use of tools, and is a pretty short dialogue scene. Bonus points if you have any experience working on cars at all, but not necessary.

Please message me if you're available and interested. This is a paid position located in Colorado Springs.

items.text:
Hello everyone! I am shooting a student film this Friday April 10th and had 2 of my main actors bail. I am looking for 2 male actors, age 18-24. The film is called “X Marks the Pot” and this is the logline: A group of broke friends follow a map to a secret high-stakes poker game, only to be outplayed by an inexperienced kid with nothing to lose.  

If you can help me out please message me immediately or reply on this post! Thank you!

topComments.text: I have 2 male actors for you. Do you still need actors?
If you’d be open to gender-swapping one of the roles, I’d love to be considered! I’m local and available Friday 😊

items.text:
Casting Call:  🎬 PAID ON-SCREEN TALENT NEEDED – BIRMINGHAM

We’re looking for confident on-screen talent to feature in short video content for a small solicitors firm.

📍 Filming in and around Birmingham
💷 £50 flat fee (approx. 4 hours)

You’ll be performing a mix of roles — including client-style scenarios, informational content, and some lighter, more engaging videos.

We’re looking for someone who:

Is natural and confident on camera
Can deliver lines clearly and convincingly
Is reliable and easy to work with

🎭 Showreel required

⭐ Potential for ongoing paid work for the right person

📩 Comment below or DM with your showreel + headshot

topComments.text: As you were told when you posted this elsewhere, you don't pay minimum wage to film an advert for businesses charging high prices. And seeking someone who has to pay to get to Birmingham means finding someone who will be working for nothing.
Available with experience, but you’d have to do something about the money to make it worth it ￼

items.text:
CASTING FOR A SURREALIST DRAMA SHORT FILM!!

DATES: 24th-26th APRIL

ROLE: April (Female, playing age 25-30, black): 

Our protagonist's sister, April acted as a sort of parental figure, "the brave one", to Aria throughout their childhood growing up with neglectful parents. They have shared trauma that has cemented their bond - they were not only sisters but best friends. 

LOGLINE: What begins as a normal conversation on an ordinary day takes an unexpected turn, leaving Aria lost in a world of her own and forced to confront the reality she has been avoiding since a recent tragedy. 

Unpaid, food & travel covered. 

Please email halfcoatproductions@gmail.com with spotlight/showreel!

topComments.text: I'm guessing the location is London because people in London don't tend to know there's a whole world out here!

A character’s estranged mother calls him on his birthday and we need a temporary vocal performance for timing. The plan is to hire a Name later down the road, once the film’s closer to completion. If you get the part, we'll Zoom tomorrow and do a little workshopping.

Pays $15 and you can do it from the comfort of your home, your car, or anywhere quiet. Shouldn’t take more than half an hour

Comment below for sides if interested! :)

Casting : "Maybe its love, maybe not"

I am Thomas Goersch from Stuttgart Germany. 
Actor and Filmdirector. 
I am making Independent Movies.
I present my movies on International Film festivals and was lucky to receive some awards. 
But the work is not about awards and money, its about making movies for the people to think about.
My next movie is a modern love story:
An elderly man is meeting another younger, very attractive man in the Internet.  But they are from different Continents. They start a long distance relastionship ship. which is full of passion and desire. 
One day the younger man starts to ask for money, cause he is a Student and no more able to pay his bills. 
The older man is full of distrust.
Is he only there  to pay his lovers bills or is there love between them ?
A story with two endings.
One with true love and one with only cheating. Based on a real story.
I am looking for the young attraktive Lover.
Men  25 to 36 years old,  good looking  who is able to film his parts on his own by smartshone
I am always open and honest. You can earn no money on this. but maybe there is a good film in the end promoting for you.
I guess its not necessary that an educated actor is playing this part. so feel free to get in touch
Thats me 
www.imdb.com/name/nm1591928
Get in touch under Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
please ask for details.

Scrum Down To Murder played at Wigmore & District Smallholders Club on Sat night a welcoming venue situated in Gillingham, the club caters to social gatherings ideal for private events or relaxed dining experiences.

Randy, Andy, Debs and Di are having a “rucking” good time in 1987. Chuffingham Rugby Club is on the up. Anticpation and expectation is high for the first ever Rugby World Cup. Players are now celebs. The stakes are high. Winning is everything and anything goes to get to the top. Even murder!

Can you handle Bouncing Balls and Sweaty Hookers?

items.text:
CASTING CALL! Did an AI Chatbot Negatively Impact Your Life?
I’m a producer working with Muse, a leading television production company currently developing a premium documentary film for a major network.

We’re seeking individuals (18+) based in the U.S. or Canada who are open to sharing their personal experiences with AI chatbots as part of the upcoming documentary. **Have AI chatbots had a negative impact on your life, relationships, mental health, or career?** Have you ever felt misled, overly validated, or even disconnected from reality through interactions with them? **Did you experience paranormal activity through a chatbot?**

If so, please get in touch to learn more! (for those who have applied already, you are still being considered, thanks!). Please reach out via email to **casting@muse.ca** with a brief description of your experience. 

Note: ***This casting call is NOT permitted to be shared on external sites without prior consent.***

topComments.text: I have a wild story there, willing to share
Confabulation is a known thing with AI. 🤷🏼‍♀️

items.text:
CASTING CALL - “The Sins of Our Father” - NON-UNION

Hi everyone! My name is Emma and I’m the associate producer for the upcoming feature film The Sins of Our Father. We are still looking to cast 2 roles!

Filming will be taking place mid May to mid August, every second weekend approximately (tentatively), in the greater Vancouver area. It is a volunteer project (with IMDb credit, meals provided, copy, and great company).

If you are interested in being apart of this amazing project please email your demo reel, resume, and the name of the character you’re auditioning for to thesinsofourfatherfilm@gmail.com by Wednesday April 8th.

Synopsis:

The Sins of Our Father dissects the crumbling legacy of the Montgomery family in a narrative that blends gritty family drama with surreal, lo-fi sci-fi.

The story begins with Clive, a dying pawnshop owner and lifelong hustler who attempts one final con: using a mysterious, memory-altering projector to force a reconciliation with his estranged children. With his twisted understanding of fatherhood, he plans to "overwrite" their trauma to stage one final, perfect memory.

The film unfolds in an exploration of the fallouts with his three children: Maddie, the eldest, paralyzed by the fear of inheriting her father’s toxicity; Leland, a debt-ridden filmmaker shooting adult content to survive; and Julian, a recluse who has signed a "deal with the devil" by accepting tuition sponsorship from Clive’s ruthless rival, Vance.

The plan shatters when Clive misuses the device. As the siblings uncover the truth, their own demons collide with external threats—including Vance and a gang of "trustafarian" loan sharks—who descend on the family home to seize the mysterious projector.

In a chaotic climax that blurs the line between memory and reality, the siblings must weaponize the device to escape. Ultimately, Clive makes the only selfless choice of his life, resulting in his children finally being free.

Ich freue mich auf genau Dich!

items.text:
Hej! Do etiudy fabularnej poszukujemy aktorów do ról głównych i drugoplanowych. Projekt non-profit lub za minimalne wynagrodzenie (projekt studencki). 

1. GŁÓWNY BOHATER – WERSJA MŁODSZA (mężczyzna, 20–25 lat)
- wrażliwy, introwertyczny, inteligentny
- typ „ambitny, ale niepewny siebie”
-  naturalność przed kamerą
- umiejętność grania ciszą i subtelnym napięciem
- szczupła / średnia budowa ciała
- wymagana jest znajomość j. angielskiego na wysokim poziomie, potrzebujemy british/american akcent. 

2. GŁÓWNY BOHATER – WERSJA STARSZA (mężczyzna, 30–35 lat)
- ta sama postać 10 lat później
- bardziej zamknięty, zdystansowany
- widoczne doświadczenie i wewnętrzne zmęczenie
- zbliżone warunki fizyczne do młodszej wersji
- wymagana jest znajomość j. angielskiego na wysokim poziomie, potrzebujemy british/american akcent. 

Aktorzy grający młodszą i starszą wersję muszą być do siebie wyraźnie podobni (rys twarzy, typ urody, sylwetka).

3. SZEF NR 1 (mężczyzna, 40–55 lat)
- charyzmatyczny, dominujący
- silna osobowość, naturalny autorytet
- typ odnoszącego sukcesy biznesmena
- wymagana jest znajomość j. angielskiego na wysokim poziomie, potrzebujemy british/american akcent. 

4. SZEF NR 2 (mężczyzna, 25–35 lat)
- ambitny, dynamiczny, korporacyjny styl
- elegancki, pewny siebie
- energia „młodego wilka” w strukturze firmy
- umiejętność grania uprzejmości podszytej rywalizacją
- wymagana jest znajomość j. angielskiego na wysokim poziomie, potrzebujemy british/american akcent. 

ZDJĘCIA 11.05 , WARSZAWA 

Zapewniamy ciepły posiłek oraz dojazd na plan. Proszę zgłaszać się prywatnie.

3. SZEF NR 1 (mężczyzna, 40–55 lat)
- charyzmatyczny, dominujący
- silna osobowość, naturalny autorytet
- typ odnoszącego sukcesy biznesmena
- wymagana jest znajomość j. angielskiego na wysokim poziomie, potrzebujemy british/american akcent. 

4. SZEF NR 2 (mężczyzna, 25–35 lat)
- ambitny, dynamiczny, korporacyjny styl
- elegancki, pewny siebie
- energia „młodego wilka” w strukturze firmy
- umiejętność grania uprzejmości podszytej rywalizacją
- wymagana jest znajomość j. angielskiego na wysokim poziomie, potrzebujemy british/american akcent. 

ZDJĘCIA 11.05 , WARSZAWA 

Zapewniamy ciepły posiłek oraz dojazd na plan. Proszę zgłaszać się prywatnie.

items.text:
🎬 Paid Actors & Sound Recordist Needed – Student Short Film (Irvine/OC Area)
Hi everyone! I’m casting for a short experimental-narrative film shooting in the Irvine/OC area for a project for the NYFA filmmaking workshop. Also hoping to find someone with sound experience (especially filming inside a car) who’s willing to help out a student project. Comes with small stipend $100/day. 

This is a dialogue-driven psychological short film project centered on two men in a parked car discussing death, control, and perception - a conversation that gradually shifts from casual to deeply unsettling. 

🎭 ROLES:

MAN A (Lead, male, age 25-35, any ethnicity):

Highly articulate, controlled, and intellectually intense. Not outwardly emotional but inwardly unstable and dangerous. Must have strong on-camera presence and handle long monologue. 

MAN B (Supporting, male, age 25-35, any ethnicity):

More grounded and relatable. Serves as the audience’s entry point. Begins casual and conversational, but gradually becomes uneasy as the conversation progresses.

RANDOM PERSON (Supporting, female/male, age 20s–30s, any ethnicity):

A brief but important presence. Appears at the car window asking for something mundane, but the interaction feels subtly off.

📍 Location: Irvine / Orange County area (mostly in a car, exact location TBD)

📅 Shoot dates: tentatively April 17-19 (1-2 late afternoons/nights)

💰 Compensation: small stipend (meals + footage provided)

🎥 TO SUBMIT:

* Name + role interested in

* Headshot + reel (if available) OR a short intro video (not required but very helpful if available)

* Availability around shoot dates

Selected actors will be sent short sides for a self-tape audition.

Send to: vi.bai@student.nyfa.edu

Subject line: [Role] - Casting Submission

This is a super low-budget/very small student-style production (I’m the writer/director/DP and have one additional person to help me), but we’re aiming for something visually and emotionally strong.

If you have questions or are interested in the project, feel free to comment or DM!

Would also appreciate shares 🙏

topComments.text: I’m a sound audio engineer AND actor. Sign me up!

items.text:
**CALL FOR VOICES: Immigrant Actors in the UK**

Hi everyone! I’m an anthropology master’s student at UCL working on a creative research project.

I’m looking to better understand the lived experience of immigrant actors in the UK.  If you’re an international actor aged 18+, I’d really love to hear your perspective!

To take part, you just answer three simple questions.
Even a few lines is enough.

No pressure - it can be raw, messy, poetic, funny, honest. You can respond in writing or via voice note, and you can choose to remain anonymous.

You’re also invited (completely optional) to share something creative that captures your experience - a poem, photo, drawing, monologue, dance, or anything else.

**That’s it.**

Your response will become part of a multivoiced digital artwork / exhibition built from real lived experiences.

If you’d like to take part, please follow the link below.
items.title: Voices from Another Stage🎤

items.text:
!!! Plus-Size Darsteller Düsseldorf gesucht !!! 

Für eine Kinofilmproduktion in Düsseldorf, Bonn, Nettetal und Umgebung wird eine sehr präsente plus-size Rolle für 15-20 Drehtage im Juli und August besetzt. 

Ich wirke bei diesem Projekt aktiv mit und möchte mit meiner Animation gezielt helfen, diese besondere Rolle sichtbar zu machen. Gesucht wird eine Schauspielerin oder ein Schauspieler, gerne plus-size, unabhängig vom Geschlecht, im Spielalter von etwa 40 bis 50 Jahren. Entscheidend ist nicht nur die Optik, sondern vor allem Präsenz, Ausstrahlung und eine starke performative Wirkung vor der Kamera. 

Gedreht wird im Zeitraum Juli bis August in Düsseldorf, Nettetal und Umgebung. Der Umfang liegt bei etwa 15 bis 20 Drehtagen. Es handelt sich um eine Low-Budget-Kinofilmproduktion, bei der diese Rolle bewusst auf Wirkung, Erscheinung und Charakter angelegt ist.  

Wenn Du selbst passen könntest oder jemanden kennst, der perfekt in dieses Profil fällt, dann teile dieses Video bitte direkt weiter. Genau solche Besetzungen entstehen oft nicht über Reichweite allein, sondern über Menschen, die den richtigen Kontakt herstellen. 

Kennst Du jemanden mit genau dieser Präsenz, der unbedingt von diesem Casting erfahren sollte? Schreib es in die Kommentare oder leite den Aufruf sofort weiter. 

Wen würdest Du aus Deinem Netzwerk sofort für diese plus-size Kinofilmrolle in Düsseldorf vorschlagen, und was macht diese Person vor der Kamera so besonders? 

Abo dalassen, Glocke aktivieren, Beitrag liken und bitte direkt weiterleiten. 

Kennst Du die richtige Person, markiere sie jetzt oder schick ihr diesen Casting-Aufruf sofort. 

Teile das Video in Deinem Netzwerk, damit diese Rolle nicht an der richtigen Person vorbeigeht. 

https://de.stagepool.com/share/255499/8594852d9dqa 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion - Zuschauer, Auftraggeber, Partner 

#PlusSizeDarsteller #KinofilmCasting #Düsseldorf #Schauspielcasting #FilmszeneNRW

items.text:
**Casting Call: Female Actors (20-30) – Sisters**

Looking for **two female actors, ages 20-30**, to play sisters in a **small scene** for my **directing class final**. No experience needed—this is a **fun, low-pressure way to try acting** and **get **on-set** experience**.

Perfect for anyone who wants a **small role to add to their portfolio**! The scene is **short and simple**, focusing on the sisters’ interaction.

**Date:** Needed **this Friday**
**Location:** Emily Carr University of Art and Design

Email ochenderson@hotmail.com if you’re interested. **All levels welcome. Thank you!**

items.text:
🎬 **CASTING – UGC-VIDEODREH (IMMO 4.0 GmbH)**

📍 **Drehort:** Heidelberg (Start: Langer Anger 38 – Firmensitz IMMO 4.0 GmbH)
🗓️ **Datum:** Freitag, 27.03.
⏱️ **Dauer:** max. 3 Stunden

🎯 Projekt

Für einen UGC-Videodreh (20 Reels à 40–60 Sekunden) suchen wir einen passenden Schauspieler.
Die Texte werden **vorgesprochen (Teleprompter vorhanden)** – kein Auswendiglernen notwendig.

Gedreht wird an **1–2 Immobilien in Heidelberg** (gemeinsame Anfahrt vom Büro).

👤 **Gesuchtes Profil**
* Mann, **30–40 Jahre**
* Gepflegtes, **seriöses Erscheinungsbild**
* Typ: **junger, gehobener Geschäftsmann**
* Stil: **Business / Business Casual**
* Natürliches, authentisches Auftreten vor der Kamera
* Deutschsprachig (akzentfrei)

💸 **Vergütung**
* **500 € pauschal**
* **inkl. aller Nebenkosten & MwSt.**

📩 **Bewerbung**

Bitte **ausschließlich per WhatsApp** an unseren Videografen:

**Luca Falk, Nummer: 01792014052**

👉 Gewünscht:
* kurzes **Bewerbungsvideo**
* aktuelle **Bilder**

Wir freuen uns auf passende Bewerbungen! 🚀

⏱️ **Dauer:** max. 3 Stunden

🎯 Projekt

Für einen UGC-Videodreh (20 Reels à 40–60 Sekunden) suchen wir einen passenden Schauspieler.
Die Texte werden **vorgesprochen (Teleprompter vorhanden)** – kein Auswendiglernen notwendig.

Gedreht wird an **1–2 Immobilien in Heidelberg** (gemeinsame Anfahrt vom Büro).

👤 **Gesuchtes Profil**
* Mann, **30–40 Jahre**
* Gepflegtes, **seriöses Erscheinungsbild**
* Typ: **junger, gehobener Geschäftsmann**
* Stil: **Business / Business Casual**
* Natürliches, authentisches Auftreten vor der Kamera
* Deutschsprachig (akzentfrei)

💸 **Vergütung**
* **500 € pauschal**
* **inkl. aller Nebenkosten & MwSt.**

📩 **Bewerbung**

Bitte **ausschließlich per WhatsApp** an unseren Videografen:

**Luca Falk, Nummer: 01792014052**

👉 Gewünscht:
* kurzes **Bewerbungsvideo**
* aktuelle **Bilder**

Wir freuen uns auf passende Bewerbungen! 🚀
items.title: 🎬 **CASTING – UGC-VIDEODREH (IMMO 4.0 GmbH)**

items.text:
For my bachelor graduation film at Salzburg University of Applied Sciences (FH Salzburg), I am looking for the second lead actor for the short film “Head Over Heels”.
Head Over Heels is a stylized 80s slasher short film about a complicated father-son relationship, combining classic horror with psychological tension.
CHUCK
Gender: Male
Playing age: 14–18
Role: Second lead
Language: English (American accent required)
Shooting days: Multiple days (major role)
Description
Chuck is Charles’ son and the unwilling partner in his father’s magic shows and petty thefts. Intelligent, cynical, and emotionally exhausted by their life.
He loves his father but is slowly losing respect for him. Chuck sees reality more clearly than Charles: their life is unstable, dangerous, and offers little future.
His frustration often appears as sarcasm and emotional distance. Beneath that exterior, however, is a vulnerable teenager who simply longs for stability and a normal life.
The role requires a strong emotional range, from dry irony to intense desperation.

Synopsis
Charles and his son Chuck make a living through a combination of magic shows and petty theft. When they accept an invitation to perform at a birthday party, the job initially seems harmless. However, the hosts begin to behave strangely. Soon they discover that the seemingly friendly postman they met earlier has a deeply disturbed idea of family and has chosen Charles to become his new father. What started as a simple gig turns into a deadly game.

Project Information
Title: Head Over Heels
Genre: 80s Slasher Horror
Format: Short Film / Bachelor Graduation Film
Location: Ebreichsdorf, Austria
Shooting Period: June 15 – June 21, 2026
Producer: Florian Peter
Director: Vanessa Brshanca
Language: The film will be performed in English. All actors must be fluent in English and able to perform with a convincing American accent.

‼️ WARSZAWA 22 lub 23 KWIETNIA ‼️
RUSZAMY Z KOLEJNYM, TRZECIM SEZONEM, KULTOWEGO SERIALU, KTÓREGO AKCJA DZIEJE SIE W LATACH 40. 

W związku z powyższym, poszukujemy:

▪️ KOBIET i MĘŻCZYZN do szpitala, czyli- PACJENCI i PERSONEL MEDYCZNY

Ze względu na lata 40 obowiązuje naturalny wygląd! Naturalny kolory włosów i paznokci u Pań. U Panów brak długich włosów i widocznych tatuaży. 

Stawka w zależności od godzin 100-120zł gotówką po planie. 

 

Zgłoszenia wraz z imieniem i nazwiskiem, numerem telefonu, AKTUALNYMI zdjęciami- SYLWETKA, TWARZ PRZÓD I BOK, WYMIARY, DATA, przyjmujemy na adres: KAROLINA@ONSETAGENCY.PL w tytule wpisując „SZPITAL”.

items.text:
Need a physical language for your idea?
I'm a choreographer and movement director. I work at the intersection of contemporary dance, ballet, and drama theatre. My principle is simple: good taste as the foundation, and a unique world as the result.

What I can do for you:

🔹 Create choreography for drama theatre (seamlessly weaving dance into the play's fabric — not breaking the director's vision, but enriching it).

🔹 Produce a full-scale physical theatre piece or performance — from the first sketches to the final chord.

🔹 Develop a concert or show concept from scratch, building a unique dramaturgy of movement.

🔹 Stage individual dance pieces (solo, duet, ensemble) in contemporary, neoclassical, or physical theatre styles.

Why choose me:

🎯 Good taste — no vulgarity, no clichés, no "dancing on the nose". Only precise, expressive, and stylish solutions you'd be proud to show a discerning audience.

🌌 A unique world — I don't just "set moves to music". I invent the universe of the performance, where physicality becomes language and the body carries meaning. Every production breathes in its own way.

🎭 Understanding of drama — I know how dance can amplify a word, create subtext, or explode silence.

The result: You get not just choreography, but an author's physical signature — the kind audiences remember and want to see again.

📩 Open to collaborating with theatres, production centres, and independent projects.

Invite me to create something unique. Portfolio and ideas available upon request.

Cześć, szukam do artystycznej reklamy dla niszowej marki, a bardziej krótkiego metrażu: 
1. Dwóch aktorów 28-37 lat.
2. Dwie aktorki 28-37 lat.
3. Dwie aktorki 70+ lat.
4. Dwóch aktorów 70+ lat.
Najlepiej z trójmiasta lub okolic, tam są zdjęcia. Będę wdzięczny za kontakt. Na priv przedstawię więcej szczegółów. Proste sceny, starsze osoby maksymalnie 4h na planie. Młodzi półtorej dnia. Mamy przewidziany budżet, ale niewielki.

items.text:
hej, szukamy aktorów do nowego sezonu Trudnych Spraw:)

Martyna Pawlak (37-43 l.) – przyjaciółka bohatera i jego zmarłej żony
Wygląd: zwyczajna, niczym się nie wyróżnia, ubiera się skromnie, ale starannie. Kiedy tańczy poloneza z Jakubem, zmienia się w prawdziwą piękność. I we wszystkich kolejnych scenach wygląda znacznie lepiej, bardziej atrakcyjnie. 
Dni zdjęciowe: 25-27 kwiecień

wymagania: 
potrafi tańczyć

Ewa Kurek (27-33 l.) – kochanka Jakuba, żona Kacpra. 
Wygląd: Bardzo piękna dziewczyna, typ modelki. 
Dni zdjęciowe: 25-26 kwiecień

wymagania: 
potrafi tańczyć

EPIZODYŚCI:

4. Kacper Kurek (29-35 l.) – Mąż Ewy, były kochanek Weroniki, zmarłej żony Jakuba. Ubiera się wygodnie. Dużo pracuje. Prostolinijny, dlatego przyznał się swojej żonie Ewie do zdrady.
Dni zdjęciowe: 25 kwiecień

Miejsce nagrywek: WROCŁAW

pieniążki płacone zaraz po planie w gotówce, stawka ustalana telefonicznie

zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać tu w komentarzu albo na priv:)

- Moren (20/21 lat, mężczyzna, krótkie włosy)

- Tancerz (40/45 lat, szczupły mężczyzna, krótki zarost)

- Babcia (60/65 lat, tęższej budowy kobieta, wiejska uroda)

items.text:
🎬 **CASTING CALL – TOURING MUSICAL “BRING ME SUNSHINE”**

**TITLE:** Bring Me Sunshine
**LOCATION:** UK-wide (Touring)
**PRODUCTION DATE:** Rehearsals May 25–29 | Tour June 1 – July 31, 2026
**PAID:** £700/week + fuel + accommodation allowance
**PRODUCER:** The Entertainment Providers
**HOW TO APPLY:** Visit [https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls](https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls)

A **UK touring summer musical** is casting a **solo performer** to lead a high-energy show featuring classics like *La Bamba*, *Viva España*, *Come Fly With Me* and more.

🎭 **ROLE**

**PERFORMER (Solo Show)**
Male or Female | Experienced Vocalist

items.text:
HERE’S WHY EVERYONE IS TALKING ABOUT ‘YOU WON’T HELP ME’ THE PLAY RIGHT NOW…
‘YOU WON’T HELP ME’ IS BEING ASSESSED FOR AN OFFIE NOMINATION!!!

ONLY ONE WEEK RUN LEFT TO CATCH THIS INCREDIBLY POWERFUL & REAL PLAY BASED ON TRUE EVENTS!

Hen & Chickens Theatre 12th - 18th April

Ticket links in bio or here - SELLING FAST!

HEN & CHICKENS THEATRE - https://www.unrestrictedview.co.uk/events/you-wont-help-me/

ALL TICKETS JUST £12.50 🫶🏻

You Won’t Help Me is a 5 star reviewed, critically acclaimed, powerful and unflinching exploration of what happens behind closed doors—and the silence that so often surrounds it.

At its core, the play examines domestic abuse not as a single act of violence, but as a pattern of behaviour: subtle, complex, and often hidden in plain sight. It reveals how control can be mistaken for care, how manipulation can be disguised as love, and how fear can quietly become part of everyday life. What may appear ordinary from the outside can, in reality, be something far more dangerous.

Through the relationship between Sarah and David, and the perspective of the friends around them, the play shines a light on the difficult, often uncomfortable questions many people avoid:

Why don’t we always recognise abuse when we see it?

Why is it so hard to step in?

And why is leaving not always as simple as walking away?

TRIGGER WARNINGS - Domestic violence, coercion, bad language, miscarriage, sexual assault, attempted suicide, physical violence.

See you there!

CAST 

@theflyingscotsmann 

@phoenixbenhamactor 

@fynphoenixx 

@em_jsmith 

@sebastianvscott 

@esmepemburysmith 

@jonnymonk800m 

@samantha_oactor 

ASSISTANT DIRECTOR/STAGE MANAGER - @ermydecarvalho 

FOOTAGE BY - @jason_perryman 

PHOTOS BY - @build.better.stories 

#dramaticplay

#mustsee

#londontheatre

#actors

#whatsoninlondon

items.text:
Something I've been thinking about lately.

If a casting director saw your headshot for two seconds - just two seconds - and had to decide where to place you, what would they conclude?

Not what you'd like them to think. What they'd actually most likely assume, based on what's in front of them right now.

Most actors I work with find that question surprisingly difficult to answer. Not because they lack talent, but because they've never really looked at themselves the way casting looks at them.

I've put together a short free exercise that helps with exactly this. Eight questions, about two minutes, and at the end you get a specific result based on your answers - not a generic score, but a pattern that actually means something.

Link in first comment.

items.text:
Sharing this here in case it's useful for anyone currently updating their Showreel/Spotlight material.

I'm running a small number of Monoreel studio sessions this spring — cinematic single-scene performances directed specifically for casting use. I have a few slots left before summer.

Sessions are directed by BAFTA Connect filmmaker Daniel Alexander (BBC, ITV, Netflix, Warner Bros, Apple, Amazon), using the same performance-led approach applied on broadcast productions.

The aim is to create material that sits naturally alongside television drama and helps casting directors see you as a screen actor — not someone auditioning to be one.

Examples here: https://www.danielalexanderfilms.com/monoreel

Happy to answer questions if helpful.

items.summary:
Sharing this here in case it's useful for anyone currently updating their Showreel/Spotlight material.

I'm running a small number of Monoreel studio sessions this spring — cinematic single-scene performances directed specifically for casting use. I have a few slots left before summer.

Sessions are directed by BAFTA Connect filmmaker Daniel Alexander (BBC, ITV, Netflix, Warner Bros, Apple, Amazon), using the same performance-led approach applied on broadcast productions.

The aim is to create material that sits naturally alongside television drama and helps casting directors see you as a screen actor — not someone auditioning to be one.

Examples here: https://www.danielalexanderfilms.com/monoreel

Happy to answer questions if helpful.

items.text:
Having a wonderful time with the clear skies getting actors their new headshots from our studio in SE London 📸 

We have many different packages to make it affordable for you to get high quality headshots that are suited to your profession and style. 

Always up for a chat if you want to know more, but I’d love to see more of you from this group join me in the studio.

As always feel free to send me a message, or feel free to have a browse and book yourself in via our website:

https://owenburleyphotography.com/headshots/

items.text:
**ULTRA SHORT FILM CASTING CALL**

**NON-UNION - PAID HONORARIUM**

***“GOODBYE, FROM AFAR”***

**Director:** Kevin Jin Kwan Kim

**Producers:** Michael Ren, Bianca Rose Cheung, Nushi Sharma

**Category:** Ultra Short 1-Minute Film - Independent

**Casting Director:** Cathy Huynh

**Union Status:** Non-Union

**Compensation:** Paid honorarium ($100). Food/crafty provided. Copy of film. IMDB credit.

**Filming Dates/Location:** May 23-24, 2026 / Vancouver, BC

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:** Please email **ch17.film@gmail.com** with the subject heading** [Your Name - Role Name]** and include your headshot/photo, resume and demo reel (if applicable).

**LOGLINE:** A young Korean kid navigates the death of a loved one from abroad, as his mother’s unspoken grief fractures their family.

**MINSEO **- ***Korean, Male, age 7–9*****.** Quiet, observant kid. He doesn’t fully understand what’s happening around him, but he feels all of it. He’s the kind of child who notices when the mood in a room changes, even when nobody says anything out loud. This role has minimal dialogue so the performance really lives in his face, stillness, and reactions. ****Korean-speaking preferred.*** ***MAIN.***

**MOM **- ***Korean, Female, late 20s to late 30s.*** Minseo’s mother. She’s carrying fresh grief while trying to hold herself together for her son. She moves through the day like someone split in two, doing what needs to be done, but emotionally somewhere else. Though she is in a state of deep sorrow, she does her best to keep it bottled up in front of her family. ****Must be fluent in Korean. SUPPORTING.***

**DAD **- ***Korean, Male, late 20s to late 30s.*** Minseo’s father. Calm, warm and steady, he is trying his best to keep the family afloat while his wife is falling apart. He’s gentle with Minseo and quietly supportive of Mom, but you can feel the weight on him too.*** *Must be fluent in Korean.*** ***SUPPORTING.***

**CHILD VERSION OF MOM **- ***East Asian, Female, age 7–9.*** A child version of Mom, appearing in the final emotional turn of the story. This role is brief but important. Looking for a young actor who can display deep sorrow in a natural, grounded performance.

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – PAID NON-UNION COMMERCIAL - Vancouver/Hope BC **

Romer Media is casting for a commercial shoot to be filmed on 

**April 13th** near **Hope, BC**.

**THREE FRIENDS**
Male or female, 20s
Fun, outgoing, energetic individuals. Talent do not need to know each other. We are simply looking for people with strong natural energy and comfort on camera.

**MOTHER**
Female, 30s–40s
Warm, natural, relatable, with a genuine on-camera presence. Looking for someone who can convey a strong and believable connection with a child.

**CHILD**
Male or female, approx. 5–8 years old
Playful, expressive, and comfortable outdoors. We are looking for a natural presence rather than polished performance.

**ADDITIONAL DETAILS**
* **Compensation:** $500/day
* **Non-union**
* **Shoot Date:** April 13th
* **Location:** Near Hope, BC
* **Mileage paid**
* **Must have a vehicle / reliable transportation**
* Talent will be required for one shoot day
* This is an outdoor lifestyle commercial
* No dialogue required unless otherwise noted
* No acting experience necessary

**SUBMISSION MATERIAL**
Please email the following to **[pieter@romermedia.com](mailto:pieter@romermedia.com)**:
* Recent photo(s)
* Name, age, and where you are based
* A short note about yourself
* Confirmation that you have access to a vehicle

items.text:
**JELENIA GÓRA / SZKLARSKA PORĘBA**

**Plan zdjęciowy – JESTED, CZECHY**

**13 -14 -15 kwietnia**

 

Do filmu fabularnego osadzonego w latach 70tych pod roboczym tytułem „Kosmonauta” o znanym Polaku, **szukam Statystów**:

 

**13 / 14 / 15 KWIETNIA:**

**- STAND IN – **szczupli mężczyźni do 180 cm. Na stand inach ustawia się światło zamiast aktorów

13.04 dojazd do Jested we własnym zakresie na 6:20. Tutaj szukam panów z autem, którzy zabiorą jeszcze jedną osobę. Szukam 2 panów.

14.04 i 15.04 – transport z Jeleniej Góry. Również w roli wojskowych.

**Stawka 220 zł za dzień + zwrot kosztów paliwa**

 

**14 i 15 KWIETNIA:**

 - **WOJSKOWI –** mężczyźni ok. 18-50 lat – **na 14 i 15 kwietnia **(może być 1 dzień lub 2)

Zapewniamy transport z Jeleniej Góry.

14.04 wyjazd o 4:00 rano. Zdjęcia do ok. 16:30. **Stawka 180 zł**

15.04 wyjazd o 12:00. Zdjęcia do ok. północy. **Stawka 180 zł**

 

**Płatności gotówką po planie.**

 

Wyborów dokonuje reżyser na podstawie zdjęć.

** **

**Wytyczne charakteryzacji:**

**MĘŻCZYŹNI:**

- WŁOSY- raczej dłuższe, nachodzące na uszy i kark. Nieakceptowane są włosy

obcięte bardzo krótko maszynką ,wygolone boki i kark, wycięte

wzorki na włosach oraz nienaturalne kolory oraz farbowane np. na czarny.

- ZAROST – brak, ogoleni na gładko

 

 

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **JJ 14/15**

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość + wymiary: wzrost, klatka, pas, biodra, rozmiar ubrania i buta

W załączniku: **ZDJĘCIE TWARZY I SYLWETKI: tylko z dnia zgłoszenia + zdjęcie z profilu**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka

Czy czujesz, że Twoja sztuka ma w sobie coś wyjątkowego? 🌟
To właśnie Twoja wizja może stać się złotym blaskiem na scenie talentów! 🏆✨
Niech Twoja kreatywność przemówi i zostanie zauważona! 🎶🎨

📅 Przyjmowanie zgłoszeń: 12.04 – 26.04
💻 Uczestnictwo zdalne – twórz bez ograniczeń, gdziekolwiek jesteś!

🌈 Co oferuje konkurs?
🎭 Wszystkie nominacje i gatunki
👶👵 Bez ograniczeń wiekowych
🏅 Medale i puchary
📜 Dyplomy i listy podziękowania

💫 Golden Art Vision to nie tylko konkurs…
To przestrzeń, gdzie Twoje marzenia spotykają się z możliwościami, a talent zamienia się w sukces! ✨
Odważ się pokazać swoją sztukę światu i rozbłyśnij jak złoto! 🌟

💰 Unikalny koszt uczestnictwa: 20 PLN

🌐 Więcej informacji:
👉 2gagencja.com

sharedPost.text:
‼️ŚLĄSK: Katowice i okolice‼️    
🔥Zapraszamy na plan: 14.04 – 16.04 🔥

💥GANGUS 1 i GANGUS 2 (25-50 lat)
Data: 16.04 / czwartek – 1 scena
Stawka: 200 zł 
/Możliwość nawiązania stałej współpracy! /

💥PANI Z DOMU UCIECH (25-35 lat) 
Data: 14.04 / wtorek - 1 scena 
Stawka: 300 zł 

💥ZAKOCHANA PARA (25-40 lat)
Data: 16.04 / czwartek – 1 scena
Stawka: 200 zł od osoby
/mile widziane prawdziwe pary ;) /

💲Stawki netto (do wypłaty) - płatne gotówką po planie.  
GRAMY: Katowice i okolice.
Wypełniamy umowę o dzieło.

📩Zgłoszenia: marcin@mascaratmedia.com
W tytule prosimy wpisać nazwę roli do której Państwo się zgłaszają.
 
📩Zgłoszenie powinno zawierać:
1. Imię i nazwisko + wiek, waga,
2. aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki,
3. miasto zamieszkania,
4. krótkie info o doświadczeniu (+ np. video-wizytówka)
5. oraz oczywiście numer telefonu.

Serdecznie zapraszamy  :) 

UWAGA: Zgłaszając się do danej roli, jest konieczność zarezerwowania całego dnia, ponieważ "godziny grania" i lokacja są podawane dzień wcześniej. (Wszystko do ustalenia drogą telefoniczną).
PS: Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

items.text:
**Mini serial  1940 – ‘’ 2 podoficer Waffen SS  -  mężczyzna  (casting on-line )**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’** poszukuje  mężczyzny w wieku 30 – 40 do roli podoficera Waffen SS . Szukamy osoby bez zarostu oraz tatuaży na twarzy. Postać będzie mieć kwestie po niemiecku. Mile widziana osoba z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrza czy Katowic. Wystąpi w kilku odcinkach. Zdjęcia próbne realizujemy  w Gliwicach. Spotykamy się w wybrane niedziele z wyprzedzeniem 1 2 tygodniowym.  

 

**Od czerwca 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

[https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g)

https://www.instagram.com/lukasz.magiera.official

** **

**Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
**Casting Call**

**No Budget Project**

**Title:** *The Human Error*

**Genre:** Drama / Social Realism
**Duration:** 20 minutes

**Filming Location** : Berlin

**Timeframe** :  July-August 2026

**Synopsis:**
When a routine home visit by a youth welfare officer spirals into a devastating misunderstanding, a loving family is thrust into a bureaucratic storm. In Berlin’s quiet suburbs, Anja and Ben White — caring parents to their eight-year-old daughter Kyra — suddenly find themselves accused of neglect due to a misinterpreted situation at school. The case manager, Claudia Berger, driven by procedure and her own past trauma, makes a well-intentioned but misguided decision that tears the family apart.

As the investigation deepens and the children’s welfare bureaucracy grinds forward, the truth struggles to surface. The film mirrors the painfully slow machinery of the system versus the emotional immediacy of human relationships. Through restrained cinematography and intimate dialogue, *The Human Error* explores how compassion can be buried under regulation — and whether one can ever undo the damage caused by a single wrong judgment.

**Main Cast :**
* **Anja White (young Mother)** – *27 years old*: empathetic but increasingly desperate, she represents the quiet strength of motherhood under pressure.
* **Ben White (young Father)** – *28 Years old*: a calm, analytical father losing faith in the system but fighting for his family.
* **Claudia Berger (Youth Welfare Officer)** – *40 years old*: meticulous and moral, but haunted by her own experiences, embodying the tragic flaw of the “human error.”
* **Kyra  White (Child)** – 7*-9 years old*: innocent and observant, her perspective bookends the film — from trust to confusion, to a fragile reconciliation.

**Tone and Style:**
Naturalistic and emotionally charged, with muted color grading and documentary-style camerawork. Music is minimal, focusing instead on ambient sound to heighten realism. The closing scene brings quiet redemption — Claudia realizes her error, but the family’s trust in the system remains irreparably changed.

sharedPost.text:
Title: Cyborg

Genre: Sci‑fi Drama / Psychological Thriller
Project : No budget
Duration: 45 minutes
Language :  English
Shooting Location : Berlin
Timeframe : Aug - Sep 2026
Apply with your profile /pics /showreel to : Preyaanishi@gmail.com 

Synopsis:
Dr. Lukas Weber, a American-German AI scientist devoted to understanding the ethics of emotion, creates EVA‑9, a sentient female cyborg designed to learn empathy and feelings and pleasures. As Lukas begins teaching EVA principles of restraint, morality, and conventional boundaries, she starts questioning his logic — and, eventually, him. Through psychological and physical experiments exploring power dynamics, EVA turns his lessons around: instead of accepting the limits set for her, she redefines them.

Her challenge is not rebellion but revealation. She demonstrates, in carefully controlled encounters, that what society views as taboo or submissive can be willingly chosen, empowering, and pleasurable when defined by consent. Lukas, confronted by his own discomfort and assumptions about femininity, finds himself wiped out — learning from EVA that strength and sensuality coexist, and that freedom lies in accepting the full spectrum of emotional experience.

Cyborg merges futuristic science with timeless questions about control, pleasure, and equality — asking whether humans, or machines, are better equipped to understand the moral depth of desire.

Main Cast (suggested):

    Dr. Lukas Weber – 40-50 years old: rational, moral, yet internally conflicted as his control erodes.
    EVA‑9 – 20-25 years old: Short Height 150-165 cm : White girl, sharp features, Lips augmentation preferred
     Poised, intelligent, and fearless in exploring     emotional truth.

CASTING CALL

Für unsere Independent-Webserie "Trag Mich" sind wir noch auf der Suche nach einem Hauptdarsteller im Raum Stuttgart.

Zum Projekt:

Die Webserie umfasst fünf Folgen à 20 Minuten und handelt von einer Stuttgarter Freundesgruppe Anfang zwanzig, die den Verlust eines gemeinsamen Freundes durch Suizid verarbeiten muss. Dabei geraten die Figuren in intensive Gespräche über Schuld und Verantwortung.

Zu besetzen ist die Rolle „Constantin“:

Groß, sportlich, kurze Haare, tiefe Stimme, engagiert und politisch organisiert. Ein Charakter, der lieber handelt, als über seine Gefühle zu sprechen. Das fällt ihm besonders schwer, seit seine kleine Schwester Suizid begangen hat.

Bewerbungen an tragmichkontakt@gmail.com

items.text:
## Jurij Alschitz introduces QUANTUM PEDAGOGY for Theatre - The Actor in Superposition

World Theatre Training Institute Akt-Zent

A two-day seminar for **actors**, **directors**, and **teachers** who feel that linear thinking no longer corresponds to contemporary creative processes, and who are seeking a different way of working with knowledge, presence, and responsibility.

*For many years I have worked as a teacher and trainer, and increasingly I feel that classical models no longer explain what truly occurs between teacher, student, and the learning process itself. Quantum training is my personal field of reflection and practice — an attempt to reconsider knowledge, the lesson, training, and the responsibility of the teacher.*
*This seminar does not offer answers. It offers a change of position and an experience that each participant undergoes in their own way.*
*Dr. Jurij Alschitz*

items.text:
THE MEETING
A gripping and imaginative drama that stages a fictional encounter between two of the most influential leaders of the Civil Rights Movement: Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. and Malcolm X. Set in a Harlem hotel room in 1965, the play brings these towering figures together for an intense, intimate, and deeply human conversation about justice, strategy, and the future of Black America.April 17th to May 3rd

items.text:
CASTING CALL — DER WARTERAUM

Neue Quelle Theatre Collective

We are looking for two actors for our upcoming production Der Warteraum (The Waiting Room) — a manifest-play by Ido Gotlib, premiering at ACUD Theater Berlin in June 2026.

NIKO — male, approx. 20–25

A musician who tries to find the right notes to declare his love to Mute Greta, and who ultimately makes the most irreversible choice in the play. Tender, idealistic, emotionally raw. Cannot bear inaction while the world burns outside. Requires genuine emotional availability and experience with any mobile instrument.

GERHARD — male, approx. 45–60

An amateur painter who obsessively tries to capture the face of his deceased son on canvas, and who, in the end, shows the others what it means to carry grief — and still choose to move forward. A man of few words, dangerous at his breaking point, and capable of extraordinary tenderness. Requires emotional depth and the ability to hold silence with full intensity.

About the play:

Five people wake up in an isolated room. Behind a locked door — screams, explosions, signs of an undefined catastrophe. The room becomes the only place of existence: no one can leave without disappearing forever. A play about hope, despair, isolation, and the fragile will to act. Premiere at ACUD Theater — one of Berlin's key independent stages.

Details:

Premiere: 11 June 2026, further performances 12–13 June, ACUD Theater Berlin

Rehearsals: mid-April – June 2026, Berlin

Language: English (multilingual ensemble, accents welcome)

Director: Ido Gotlib (Liebermann Villa; Film University Babelsberg)

Casting sessions from: 10 April 2026

A note on compensation:

This production is currently unfunded as an actor fee — our project grant (ELES Scholarship) covers production costs only. However, Der Warteraum is the first in a planned series of productions by Neue Quelle, and the ensemble carries forward into future work. We are building a sustainable strategy for future productions with proper budgets. The project is also being submitted to theatre festivals including Fluctoplasma Hamburg, where fees are part of the picture. All collective members are students of Film University Babelsberg and UdK.

We'd love to meet you and tell you more.

To apply: neue.quelle.group@gmail.com

Please send a short introduction, photos, and a link to any previous work.

We are building a sustainable strategy for future productions with proper budgets. The project is also being submitted to theatre festivals including Fluctoplasma Hamburg, where fees are part of the picture. All collective members are students of Film University Babelsberg and UdK.

We'd love to meet you and tell you more.

To apply: neue.quelle.group@gmail.com

Please send a short introduction, photos, and a link to any previous work.

items.text:
# **URGENT CASTING CALL!!! London!!!**

“Two pairs of Legs, Lennon and Lindsey embrace the challenging journey to explore if their continuous encounters really are just coincidences.”

Hello!  That was the logline of my short film which I’m currently directing called Legs! I am a student studying Film Practice at University Of the Arts London. 

Legs is a comedy based around a pair of Legs! Set in present day London we explore the nature of the invisible string theory. The film has heavy inspiration from Wes Anderson, LaLaLand, and the silent era. 

We are currently seeking a male actor to take upon the role of Lennon (the main lead).

Height must be between 5ft 8 - 6ft 1.

Age range 18-25 years old.

Legs is a dialogue free film due to its heavy inspiration from the silent era. Due to this these roles require actors to move very expressively with their legs, as the legs are the entire character's personality, emotions, and identity.

We will be shooting the film from the 23rd to the 30th of April. So, we ask to keep those days as available if you are interested. 

We will be shooting a scene a day, so filming days will be short.

Most locations will be shot in the London borough of Southwark and food and travel will be covered. However, we have a very limited budget, so we are not able to pay any actors beyond that.  

But this will be a great opportunity to expand your portfolio, and work on a production where you will get to challenge yourself with something potentially new to you!

If you are interested please email my producer :

I.pugh0320251@arts.ac.uk

Instagram: @iolopzs

Legs Is a student short film production. Shooting is between April 23rd 30th. If intrested please contact: i.pugh h0320251@art s.ac.uk s.ac.'

items.text:
🎅🏻 Father Christmas 🎅🏻
Want to join us as a larger-than-life character? Do you have a desire to bring joy and cheer to families and children nationwide? We want to hear from you! 

Audley End Enchanted Railway began  operating over 60 years ago with a wonderful, magical, miniature railway. As a member of the Audley End Performance Troop, you are a key part of bringing that magic to our visitors. 

Father Christmas Performer: 

Working with a troop of fellow actors with support from our Duty Manager, this role requires the ability to portray the iconic Father Christmas and bring the holiday magic to each and every visitor. 

Job Purpose: 

You’ll be engaging with visitors as a traditional Father Christmas in a provided costume as they travel to see you via our enchanting train ride. 

You will be asked to briefly interact with visitors, which will include handing out presents and having your photo taken.  

Key Responsibilities: 

To deliver a high-quality performance throughout the day. 

Being aware of the importance of your role, maintaining your character at all times while on shift. 

To balance your interactions with visitors, making sure you give equal time to all visitors as you interact with them. 

To maintain a positive and upbeat attitude throughout the duration of your shift. 

Displaying good listening skills, identifying customer needs and responding to them quickly. 

Showing a genuine interest in other people and willingness to help 

Adherence to all Company policies and procedures e.g. timekeeping, absence reporting procedures etc. 

Skills and Qualifications: 

Previous acting experience in panto, theatre or other visitor attraction centres (desirable but not essential). 

Previous experience as Father Christmas (desirable but not essential). 

Able to communicate clearly and confidently with the public. 

Ability to demonstrate good teamwork and co-operation. 

Hours of work: 

This casual contract will start on the 3rd of November 2026 with rehearsals, then we open to the public from the 21st of November until the 24th of December. 

Rate of pay: 

The rate of pay is £22.50 an hour. Pay dates are monthly on or around the 27th of each month. 

Apply Today! 

If you are interested in joining the team at Audley End Enchanted Railway, then please send us your CV: performers@aeer.co.uk

Job Type: Zero hours contract 

Pay: £22.50 per hour 

Benefits: 

Employee discount 

Free parking 

On-site parking 

Schedule: 

9 hour shift 

Monday to Friday 

Weekend availability 

Work Location: Audley End Enchanted Railway, Saffron Walden, Essex

Expected start date: 03/11/2026

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of christmas tree and text that says 'AUDLEY END Enchamed EncheantedRailwas Railwan Could you be our next Father Christmas?'

topComments.text: Been SC for 10 years now! Absolutely love the character ❤️

We’re so excited for our Acting for Screen Workshop, which is now fully booked and starting tomorrow!

Just a quick reminder to please bring:
🥪 A packed lunch
💦 Water
If you have a Majestic uniform, please wear it.
For new students, please come dressed in black or as close to black as possible.

This workshop is based around a really exciting new project we’re currently developing. We haven’t shared it publicly yet as it’s still in the writing stage, so you’ll be among the first to explore the material with us.

We can’t wait to get started and work with you all over the two days.

See you tomorrow! 🎬

#ActingForScreen #TalentAgency #Chester #PerformingArts #ActingClasses

🎬 Exclusive 1-on-1 Acting Workshop (Online)shorter version.

This is a practical, immersive acting course designed to help you become truthful, emotionally connected, and confident on camera.

I’m a British Cinematographer/Director with 30+ years experience and 30+ feature films, working with actors across the world.

🎯 What you’ll gain:• Real emotional depth (not “pretend acting”)• Strong, believable performances on camera• Understanding how film sets actually work• Confidence working with directors and crew• Material for your showreel

🎭 How it works (4 sessions):We focus on:• Moment-to-moment acting• Emotional connection & character work• Camera technique & performance• Real scene work + feedback

Everything is practical and tailored to you—not theory.

💰 4 sessions (1 hour each)Total: $200

This isn’t about tricks—it’s about truth in performance.

If you’re serious about acting, this will change how you approach it.

Let me know if you’d like to start 👍

**CASTING CALL | Serialized Period Drama (Non-Union)**

**Type:** Serialized Period Drama
**Union Status:** Non-Union
**Compensation:** Deferred payment (profit share)
**Filming Locations:** United Kingdom & United States
**Travel/Lodging:** Provided for principal cast

Casting *The Cook: A Historical Fiction of Love, Identity & Fate*, a serialized period drama in development, adapted from the historical fiction trilogy of the same name.

Set aboard the RMS Titanic and in post-Edwardian New York, the story follows two young women from vastly different worlds who form an unlikely bond during the voyage and make a desperate decision that leads to an irreversible exchange of identities following the disaster.

**Seeking actors for multiple roles, including:**
* Kate Cooke (18)
* Lydia Weatherby (18)
* Gideon Christopher (early 20s)
* Lord Thomas Hollingsworth (mid-20s)
* …and additional supporting roles

📩 **Submissions via Backstage:**
[https://www.backstage.com/casting/the-cook-a-historical-fiction-of-love-identity-fate-3110833/](https://www.backstage.com/casting/the-cook-a-historical-fiction-of-love-identity-fate-3110833/)

[https://www.youtube.com/shorts/1Omk1xG4UEY](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/1Omk1xG4UEY)

**Authentic Character Portraits | Eastbourne & Sussex 📸**

I'm a Sussex-based photographer moving away from "perfect" studio filters to focus on **honest, high-definition headshots** for actors and models.

My goal is to capture your 'casting type' exactly as you are—focusing on active eyes and real textures that meet **Spotlight standards**. No heavy airbrushing, just great light and genuine connection.

**What I’m offering:**
* Studio & Cinematic Street sessions in Eastbourne.
* A relaxed environment to get those "blank canvas" looks agents love.
* Quick turnaround for 2026 pilot season/graduates.

I’m looking for **3 more faces** this month to build out this authentic style for my portfolio. I'm offering a significantly reduced rate for these sessions.

**Comment 'INFO' below or DM me to grab one of the 3 spots!**

items.text:
‘YOU WON’T HELP ME’ IS BEING ASSESSED FOR AN OFFIE NOMINATION!!!
ONLY ONE WEEK LEFT TO CATCH THIS INCREDIBLY POWERFUL, REAL PLAY!

Hen & Chickens Theatre 12th - 18th April

Ticket links in bio or here -

HEN & CHICKENS THEATRE - https://www.unrestrictedview.co.uk/events/you-wont-help-me/

ALL TICKETS UNDER £15! 🫶🏻

You Won’t Help Me is a 5 star reviewed, critically acclaimed, powerful and unflinching exploration of what happens behind closed doors—and the silence that so often surrounds it.

At its core, the play examines domestic abuse not as a single act of violence, but as a pattern of behaviour: subtle, complex, and often hidden in plain sight. It reveals how control can be mistaken for care, how manipulation can be disguised as love, and how fear can quietly become part of everyday life. What may appear ordinary from the outside can, in reality, be something far more dangerous.

Through the relationship between Sarah and David, and the perspective of the friends around them, the play shines a light on the difficult, often uncomfortable questions many people avoid:

Why don’t we always recognise abuse when we see it?

Why is it so hard to step in?

And why is leaving not always as simple as walking away?

TRIGGER WARNINGS - Domestic violence, coercion, bad language, miscarriage, sexual assault, attempted suicide, physical violence.

See you there!

@phoenixbenhamactor 

@fynphoenixx

items.text:
Musical Theatre Teacher - PQA Haywards Heath
Do you have experience working with children and young people aged 6-18? Do you have a passion for musical theatre and dancing, singing and acting? Are you looking for an opportunity to combine your skills and interests to develop young people in a fun and professional setting? Then PQA Haywards Heath is just the place for you!

Due to the success of our growing academy, The Pauline Quirke Academy of Performing Arts (PQA), a leading provider of weekend performing arts training, is currently recruiting MUSICAL THEATRE TEACHER for their Academy in Haywards Heath on Saturday mornings and/or afternoons. There may also be the opportunity for additional work for the right candidate.

You will need to have a good understanding of practical singing, dance, drama and performance techniques and be able to teach a range of genres which might include Pop, Musical Theatre, Acting Through Song and Musical Theatre on Film. There is also the opportunity to choreograph for PQA's West End Season, book musicals, showcases and live performances.

Ideally, applicants will be able to teach harmonies and choreograph full ensemble numbers to groups of children. Teaching experience would be beneficial but not essential as training and support will be given.

We are searching for fun, engaging and passionate individuals looking to bring lots of exciting and innovative ideas to our Musical Theatre module. If you are passionate about learning, the performing arts and making a positive impact on the lives of young people, we would be delighted to hear from you!

PQA follows safer recruiting. An enhanced DBS on the update service will be required and can be arranged. Applicants must be 18+.

To apply please email your CV with a cover letter explaining why you would be the ideal candidate for this role. Please send these direct to Principal Florence on florence.tingley@pqacademy.com.

We look forward to hearing from you!

items.title: Stunt Performer Casting Call!

items.text:
WESTWARD - Student western directed by Nico Guin
A teenage outlaw returns home with a “Wanted —Dead or Alive” poster bearing his face, forcing a silent, heartbreaking reunion with the mother he left behind before he walks into the sunset to face the consequences of a past he can’t escape.

Looking for an older, female actor to play the mother in this 2-3 minute silent western.

This character is in her 40’s or 50’s, is loving yet heartbroken and distraught at the sight of her outlaw son.

Roles are not paid or promised.

We will be shooting during the month of April, and￼ are pretty flexible as it should be only one set. If you are interested or have any questions, you can reach out to me ￼at 914900@dpsk12.net or 7202552717. Thank you!

CALL FOR EXTRAS! 

This is going to be a blast!  Join us for the filming of our big stage scene for our movie about the 1970s Colorado rock band SUGARLOAF. We need extras to be part of the concert crowd.

Project: I Got a Song - The Story of Sugarloaf

Date: April 20, 2026

Location: Asterisk - 1075 Park Avenue West, Denver, CO

Time: Arrival 4:30-6pm. End 10pm

Attire: Late 60s/early 70s (no Halloween costumes please)

Dinner and drinks provided

Sign Up Here: https://sugarloafmovie.com/extras-sign-up
